title: The Death of Sulayman b. 'Abd al-Malik
description: Among the events taking place that year was the death of Sulayman b. 'Abd al-Malik.232 I was told on the authority of HishamAbu Mikhnaf, that he died in Dabiq, in the province of Qinnasrin,233 on Friday the nineteenth of $afar (October 1, 717). Thus, his term of office was two years and eight months, less five days.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 24
